title: Unlimited Tools MCP trust-store metadata sidecar (E15)
description: Store-only metadata sidecar (trust-metadata.json) of the managed MCP trust store (docs/mcp-trust-store.md, unlimited_skills/mcp/trust_store.py). It lives beside the E14-format trusted-keys.json and crl.json under <library root>/.unlimited-skills-trust/ and carries what the strict E14 formats deliberately do not: display names, informational key scopes, an informational not_before, import timestamps, and the append-only revocation history (with optional reasons). It is NEVER read by bundle verification (unlimited_skills/mcp/bundles.py) and grants nothing: trust decisions use only the trusted-keys file and the CRL, whose formats E15 reuses unchanged. The sidecar never contains key material of any kind -- key entries are addressed by key_id only.

keys.description: Per-key metadata, keyed by the trusted-keys file's key_id (E09 key_id grammar). No key material -- only labels and timestamps.

display.description: Human-readable key owner name for list/status output. Never used for trust decisions.

scopes.description: Informational scope labels (default: profile-bundles). v1 keys sign profile bundles and nothing else (design 'Key scopes'); these labels are documentation, never parsed by verification.

not_before.description: Informational RFC 3339 UTC validity start. NOT enforced by verification (E14 enforces only the per-key not_after in trusted-keys.json and the bundle's signed window).

imported_at.description: When 'unlimited-skills mcp trust import' added the key.

revocations.description: Append-only revocation history mirroring CRL additions, with optional reasons (the E14 CRL format has no reason field and stays untouched). Entries are never deleted.

key_id.description: The revoked signing key id (mirrors crl.json revoked_key_ids).

bundle_sha256.description: The revoked bundle file SHA-256 (mirrors crl.json revoked_bundles).

revoked_at.description: When 'unlimited-skills mcp trust revoke' recorded the revocation.

reason.description: Optional free-text reason. Stored here only; never in the CRL.
